content.en:
After occupying the Nine Dust Domain, Ye Tian erased the imprint of the Dawn Holy Ancestor contained in the Nine Dust Domain.

At this point, this Nine Dust Domain completely belonged to Ye Tian.

For the Fivefold Ancestor, the true value of a river basin was not to cultivate the Glazed Holy Cover, but to use it as his own private base and secret force cultivation.

Ye Tian naturally wouldn't cultivate the Glazed Sacred Cover in this river basin, after all, he had already cultivated the Glazed Sacred Cover, and this holy technique was of no use to him at all.

Of course, for the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, there are also holy techniques that are of great use, and that is the strongest holy art, but it is more difficult to cultivate.

For example, the upgraded version of the Glazed Holy Cover, the Streamer Holy Cover, requires thirty-six river basins to cultivate.

That's a lot more difficult!

After all, it takes luck to get one river basin, how to find thirty-six river basins!

Therefore, the Fivefold Primordial Ancestors did not plan to cultivate the Streamer Holy Shield, it was too difficult!

Moreover, even if it was a streamer holy cover, the power was just like that, and it was still not as good as Ye Tian's supreme natal primordial control technique.

......

"With the token of the Original Divine Palace, then copy the body of the original ancestor of Jiuchen, cultivate for a period of time, ensure the strength of this copied body, and then participate in the assessment of the Original Divine Palace, you should be able to blend into the Original Divine Palace. Ye Tian thought to himself.

As long as he infiltrates the Genshin Shrine, he can find the headquarters of the Genshin Shrine and the many treasures he masters.

Of course.

With his current strength, there is definitely no way to destroy the Genshin Palace on his own, but it is still no problem to snatch the many resources and treasures of the Genshin Palace.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian quickly copied the body of the Nine Dust Origin Ancestor, and there was no difference between it and the fallen Nine Dust Origin Ancestor.

Then, Ye Tian began to cultivate, improving the strength of this copied body, using a variety of extreme extreme ways to cooperate with quenching techniques to refine the body again and again.

As time passed, the strength of Ye Tian's primordial black beast's copy body became stronger and stronger.

After tens of thousands of Origin Realm Eras, Ye Tian was finally ready to participate in the assessment of the Origin God Palace.

So, he used the original black beast's replica body to activate the token.

At this time, he felt a guide, and immediately through this guidance, he went to his destination.

Soon, Ye Tian sensed a small watershed.

This small river basin was just a transfer station, Ye Tian entered this transfer station, and a half-step fivefold ancestor-level primordial black beast confirmed that Ye Tian was fine, and then gave a new guide, allowing Ye Tian to go to a medium-sized river basin.

And the location of the assessment is in that medium-sized watershed, as long as you complete the assessment, you are eligible to join the Genshin Shrine.

......

"Nine Dust Primordial Ancestor, this is the Primordial God Tower, with your half-step five-fold Primordial Ancestor's cultivation, pass the sixth level, and then go through the Primordial Shrine for a period of investigation, you can join the Primordial Shrine!"

A half-step fivefold ancestor-level primordial black beast said.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered the Genshin Tower and participated in this assessment.

This kind of assessment is very easy, but Ye Tian still shows a strength that is not too strong, otherwise the strength of the Nine Dust Origin Ancestor will suddenly become extremely terrifying, then there will be a problem.

In the end, Ye Tian showed that he was lucky enough to pass the sixth level, and then left the Genshin Tower.

"Nine Dust Ancestor, you only passed the fourth level last time, but I didn't expect to have passed the sixth level now, it seems that there are some opportunities! The primordial black beast said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian went back.

After a period of time, the token sent a message that his assessment and certification had been completed, and that Genshin Shrine had invited him to join.

"It's very simple, even if Genshin Shrine investigates, I can't find out the identity of this body. "

Ye Tian smiled.

Immediately, he came to the Genshin Palace according to the token.

However, it took many turns before arriving at Genshin Shrine.

Genshin Shrine is an incomparably large watershed, a truly mega-watershed, and the entire watershed is completely locked off, leaving only one portal, which connects to another large watershed.

In other words, you have to pass through another large river basin to enter Genshin Shrine.

In other words, even if Genshin Shrine is discovered, it will have to be reached from another large river basin, and Genshin Shrine can also cut off the connection to ensure the safety of Genshin Shrine.

This makes it difficult for Genshin Shrine to be invaded, unless a Sixfold Primordial Ancestor makes a move, it can easily erase Genshin Shrine.

"It's no wonder that after such a long period of time, the Upper Spirit Origin Domain can't help the Original God Palace!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

He didn't stay long in Genshin Shrine before he was sent out to a treasure place to garrison.

Of course, Genshin Shrine also gave him a complete inheritance as well as some resources.

If it was the real Nine Dust Ancestor, he was afraid that he would be extremely excited to see these inheritances and resources, but he couldn't look down on them.

During this period of time, Ye Tian continued to understand the Genshin Palace and collect all kinds of information.

Gradually, he got to know Genshin Shrine a little.

The Genshin Palace has a total of one half-step sixfold ancestor, eighteen powerhouses at the peak of the primordial ancestor, and five hundred fivefold primordial ancestors.

In terms of strength alone, the Void Fang Holy Gate is not as good as the Genshin Palace.

This is also the fact that the primordial black beast was born with a high foundation, and coupled with the fact that the primordial shrine has a complete inheritance, it can cultivate so many fivefold primordial ancestors.

However, it was too difficult for the Primordial Black Beast to become a Sixfold Ancestor, and it was even difficult to become a Half-Step Sixfold Ancestor.

......

"Black Valley!"

This is a resource treasure of the Yuan Shen Palace, and it is also a base, where there are a total of five Primordial Black Beasts of the Five-Fold Origin Ancestor level, as well as hundreds of half-step Five-Fold Origin Ancestors, and a large array.

The reason why so many Primordial Black Beasts were dispatched was because there were many precious resources that could be born here that would help the cultivation of the Fivefold Primordial Ancestors.

At the same time, it is also a resource storage site.

Genshin Shrine doesn't put all of its resources in Genshin Shrine, so what if Genshin Shrine is breached one day?

Therefore, the power of Genshin Shrine has never been concentrated in Genshin Shrine.

And the Black Valley is one of them, and how many resources are gathered here, the average half-step five-fold ancestor is naturally not clear.

Now, Ye Tian has been mobilized to the treasure land of the Black Valley, and he is ready to snatch the resources of the Black Valley.

Of course, he won't do it immediately, but wait for a while longer, otherwise if he starts to do it soon after the copy body comes, Genshin Palace will also be suspicious!

Finally, tens of thousands of years of the original domain era have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the treasure land of the Black Valley and was ready to make a move on it.
